channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Joe Kent speaks out against Iran war at prayer event after resigning
item.description: Joe Kent says he resigned as director of the US National Counterterrorism Center over opposition to the war in Iran.

item.title: EU urges members to start storing winter gas as Iran war causes price surge
item.description: War, which saw Iran attack Qatar facility, has caused 'high, volatile' gas prices that could hit EU storage projections.

item.title: Tehran holds Eid prayers as funeral held for IRGC spokesman
item.description: Eid al-Fitr prayers were held in Tehran after overnight air strikes on the capital.

item.title: Arab states should beware of Israel’s hegemonic energy expansion
item.description: The Iran war revealed how dependent Israel’s Arab neighbours are on its gas exports.

item.title: UK says Iran missile attack on Diego Garcia failed
item.description: The UK says Iran launched ballistic missiles at the joint US-UK Diego Garcia base in the Indian Ocean.

item.title: Iranian woman’s video of US-Israel attack ends as bomb hits
item.description: The fate of an Iranian woman caught in a US-Israeli bomb attack is unknown, after video emerged of her filming it.

item.title: Unease in Japan after Trump cites Pearl Harbor to defend Iran war
item.description: US president's reference to Japan's 1941 attack has shaken Japanese as PM Takaichi's silence gets mixed reaction.

item.title: Iran says US and Israel attacked Natanz nuclear facility
item.description: No leakage of radioactive materials reported in the area in central Iran, Tehran's atomic energy organisation says.

item.title: War spirals as information control tightens
item.description: From Washington to Tehran to Tel Aviv, the fight to control the narrative seems as critical as the war itself.

item.title: Drone strike near Iraqi intelligence headquarters in Baghdad kills officer
item.description: One police officer killed in strike by 'outlaw groups' on headquarters of Iraqi National Intelligence Service.
